heading_content_part: Personal InformationWe do not collect or store or share any personal                            information from our Android applications.                            Applications does not use any social networking                            functions, in-apps purchases, media or location                            sharing.

Free vs Pro applicationsFree versions uses AdMob by Google to display                            advertisements, please seeGoogle's                              policy for partner sites and appsfor                            additional privacy information. Pro versions remove                            ads.

Web SiteThe web server collects and saves only the                            default information customarily logged by server                            software. For each http request received, the date                            and time, the originating IP address, the object                            requested, and the completion status of the request                            is collected and saved.We analyze these logs to determine the amount of

traffic through the server, the number of pages                            served, the level of demand for various pages and                            referral information. We summarize the logs to                            determine statistical information on the type of                            browsers and operating systems that are being used                            to access our pages.

Use of E-MailWe appreciate your questions and comments about our                            web site and products and welcome your email                            messages to mailboxes listed on our web site. We                            preserve the content of your e-mail, your e-mail                            address and our response so that we can efficiently                            respond to questions you might have.
